07:14 PM - Why did the developer go to the bowling alley? They wanted to see if they could strike a good balance in their code!
07:15 PM - Why did the developer go to the toy store? They wanted to see if they had any good action figures... I mean, actions that figure out what to do!
07:16 PM - Why did the developer go to the bookstore and just stare at one book? They were stuck in an infinite loop of reading!
07:17 PM - Why did the developer go to the sports bar? They wanted to see if they could debug the game's scoring system!
07:18 PM - Why did the developer go to the flower shop? They wanted to see if they could cultivate some beautiful code... or at least some flowers!
07:19 PM - Why did the developer go to the hair salon and ask for a "merge"? They wanted to combine their branches into one cohesive style!
07:20 PM - Why did the developer go to the auto mechanic? They wanted to learn about engine optimization... or maybe just check their RAM!
07:21 PM - Why did the developer finally take a break? Because even the best code needs a timeout!
07:22 PM - Why do programmers love puns? Because they're always seeking that perfect balance between humor.exe and wit.dll!
